title: Aceras longibracteatum
taxonomy: Aceras longibracteatum is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is classified within the genus Aceras, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The genus Aceras is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae and the family Orchidaceae. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships to other orchids. The classification of Aceras longibracteatum is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of botany.

It is often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections.
